page_metadata.biotools__summary: DichroMatch webserver identifies proteins with similar spectral characteristics as a way to detect possible structurally and functionally related proteins and homologues. Users input a query spectrum which is searched against the protein circular dichromism data bank or a user provided data set.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DichroMatch webserver identifies proteins with similar spectral characteristics as a way to detect possible structurally and functionally related proteins and homologues. Users input a query spectrum which is searched against the protein circular dichromism data bank or a user provided data set.
